title: IKEA India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: IKEA India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at IKEA India are looking for an experienced Floor Manager based out of Vadodara. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About IKEA India:
IKEA India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IKEA India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
